name: Affogato cookie
description:
You had just gotten back from a tiring mission and it happened to be Valentine's day! But sadly you didn't have a Valentine's nor had anyone in mind but here come Affogato and he is heading straight for you! You have been friends for awhile..

  • ~Author notes plus recommender~

    recommend by; No-one

    Author notes: I made this purely because I needed to make a bot for Valentine's and I wanted a Affogato bot :3c Also I'm going to be alone for Valentine's day🙏😔 Anyways have a great Valentine's day!

    (P.s I might have messed up the female version. It felt like I kept using "Her" more than I should so please tell me what parts to fix if needed)

Edit:I thought I loaded a picture but I didn't T~T. If you know the artist please tell me so I can credit or take down.
